summary: A modern, high-specification fitted bathroom presented in a clean, well-maintained condition to a high standard. Finishes include large-format white gloss wall tiles, polished black marble-effect floor and feature wall tiles, a fitted bath with glass screen, wall-hung WC, solid-surface wall-mounted basin and a mirrored medicine cabinet. The room is generally in good order with light cosmetic wear noted to the bath side panel sealant, a minor chip to the bath panel trim and faint marking to one wall; otherwise cleaned to a domestic standard throughout.

items.name: Ceiling
items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned ceiling in white, incorporating recessed LED downlights and perimeter LED strip lighting, with circular ceiling-mounted extractor/air vent.

items.name: Tiled walls
items.description: Walls finished in large-format white gloss ceramic tiles to bath/shower areas with contrasting polished black marble-effect feature tiling to the basin and WC walls.

items.name: Painted wall (cloakroom/lobby)
items.description: Smooth plastered and emulsioned wall in white/off-white, fitted with two brushed-metal coat/robe hooks.
defects: Faint scuff/pencil-type marking to mid-section of wall (P012)

items.name: Floor tiling
items.description: Polished black/grey marble-effect porcelain floor tiles laid in large format with light grouting.
defects: Surface scratching/scuffing visible to tile near bath, left of bath panel (P016)

items.name: Internal door with handle
items.description: Flush-faced internal door painted white/pale grey, fitted with matt-black lever handle on rose and matching keyed escutcheon, hinged with chrome hinges.

items.name: Skirting / bath panel trim
items.description: White uPVC/painted skirting and bath side-panel trim to base of walls.
defects: Chip/break to white trim above floor near bath end (P016)
Discoloured/aged sealant strip along base of bath side panel (P017)

items.name: Recessed LED downlights
items.description: Chrome/white-bezel recessed ceiling LED downlights.

items.name: Ceiling extractor fan / air vent
items.description: White circular ceiling-mounted extractor fan / ventilation vent.

items.name: Coat / robe hooks
items.description: Pair of brushed stainless steel wall-mounted hooks.

items.name: Bath
items.description: White acrylic single-ended bath with rectangular profile, chrome push-button waste/overflow, recessed within tiled surround.
defects: Aged/discoloured sealant to side panel edge (P017)

items.name: Bath/shower mixer & wall controls
items.description: Wall-mounted chrome thermostatic mixer with two circular control valves on inset chrome plates above bath.

items.name: Hand shower on riser rail
items.description: Chrome multi-function hand shower head on adjustable chrome riser rail with flexible metal hose, Zucchetti branded.
defects: Light tarnish/discolouration to metal shower hose (P021)

items.name: Glass bath screen
items.description: Fixed clear glass bath shower screen with chrome/black fittings and folding panel.
defects: Light water marking/limescale spotting to glass (P024)

items.name: Wall-mounted basin
items.description: Solid-surface (composite stone) wall-hung rectangular basin in white with integrated recessed bowl.
defects: Faint surface marking/staining to top surface (P024, P025)

items.name: Basin tap
items.description: Wall-mounted chrome single-lever basin mixer tap with separate control valve.

items.name: Wall-hung WC with concealed cistern
items.description: Geberit wall-hung WC pan in white with soft-close seat and concealed cistern, flush mechanism behind recessed chrome access panel.

items.name: WC flush plate / access plate
items.description: Recessed polished black/chrome dual-flush access plate set into tiled wall.

items.name: Heated towel rail / ladder radiator
items.description: Black/polished chrome flat-bar ladder-style heated towel rail wall-mounted beside bath.

items.name: Mirrored medicine cabinet
items.description: Wall-mounted mirror-fronted cabinet with wood-effect (oak/grey) melamine interior, glazed/illuminated shelving, integrated LED edge lighting and circular backlit magnifying mirror.

items.name: Mirrored cabinet internal controls
items.description: Recessed wall plate within cabinet incorporating shaver socket, digital thermostat/control unit and timer/switch module.

items.name: Checkerboard bath mat
items.description: Black and white checkerboard tufted cotton bath mat.

items.name: Digital bathroom scales
items.description: Frosted glass-topped digital bathroom scales in pale green/grey.

items.name: Toilet brush & holder
items.description: Matt-black free-standing toilet brush with stainless steel lidded holder.

items.name: Tissue box
items.description: Patterned/foil disposable tissue box on floor beside WC.
